title: Xtra Crispy Mediterranean Fish Fillet Skewers
description: A delicious and easy to make Mediterranean dish featuring fish fillet, perfect for a lazy day, this dish is ayurvedic tamasic friendly and features a mix of fresh and crispy elements.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fish fillet to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated fish fillet onto skewers.
Dip each skewer into the panko breadcrumbs to coat.
Deep fry the skewers in the preheated oil for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the skewers from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the skewers hot on a lazy susan spinner, garnished with crumbled feta cheese.
